nasb.text: Now there went forth a wind from the Lord and it brought quail from the sea, and let them fall beside the camp, about a day’s journey on this side and a day’s journey on the other side, all around the camp and about two cubits deep on the surface of the ground.

esv.text: Then a wind from the Lord sprang up, and it brought quail from the sea and let them fall beside the camp, about a day’s journey on this side and a day’s journey on the other side, around the camp, and about two cubits above the ground.

cnv.text: 有風從耶和華那裡吹起，把鵪鶉由海面颳來，散落在營地；鵪鶉在營的四周，這邊約有一天的路程，那邊約有一天的路程，離地面約有一公尺。

ccb.text: 耶和华刮起一阵风，把鹌鹑从海面刮到营地四周，达一米之厚，方圆数公里。
